titleStmt.title: SII 17.760: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 760. (A.R. No. 703 of 1904.) TIRUPPĀṞKAḌAL, WALAJAPET TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west and south walls of the Raṅganāthaperumāḷ temple.
This record is connected with No. 751 above.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
suvatti . śrīman mahāmaṇṭalīcuraṉ hariirāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ muvarāyara kaṇṭaṉ Intu Irāya curattāṇaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu kuṭātāṉ pūṟuva tekṣaṇa paccima Uttira camuttirātipati kecaveṭṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya tevarāyamahā Irāyar pṛtivirācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa sahāttam 1000 3 100 6 10 4ṉ mel cellā niṉṟa tuṟummati saṅvaṟcarattu kumpanāyaṟṟu daśamiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattu tāmaṟ koṭṭattu vaṭakarai nāṭṭu taṉiyūr tiruppā
perumāḷ tirukkuṟuṅkuṭi Appanukkum perumāḷ paḷḷikoṇṭa perumāḷukkum pūcaipuṉaṟ kāram tiṅkaḷ tirunāḷ tiruppaṇi ṉiṟkkumpaṭikku niṉṟayam paṇṇi śrīman mahā maṇṭaleśvaran metinīmisara kaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷuva tippaiyadeva mahāirācā niṉ ṟaiyam paṇṇiṉapaṭi mahattu mallayacuvāmi jayakaḷe kaāttāvāka Intak koyil kaḷukku naṭatta kaṭavarkaḷākavum naṭattumpaṭi tiṅkaḷ tivacaṅkaḷum tirunāḷuṅ Aṅka raṅka vayipokaṅka
mallaiyya cuvāmiaiyyakaḷe naṭattumpaṭikku coṭicūlavariyum kaḻittu tārā pūṟuvamāka kuṭuttom tippayatevamāirācar Āna kāriyattukku kaṭava nāyakkar Irukaṇa nāyakkarkku samuka Appaṇaiyum paṇṇit taṉma cātaṉamum kuṭuttu Aruḷiṉapaṭi Ik ko yilkaḷukku coṭicūlavariyuṅ kaḻittu tiṅkaḷ tivaṣaṅkaḷum tirunāḷum pūcaiyum Aṅkaraṅka vayipokaṅkaḷum naṭakkumpaṭi kallu veṭṭikkuṭuttom Intap piṟamāṇam cantirātitta
kaṭavatu Ākavum Intappiṟamāṇattukku Ayitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaik karaiyil kurālkapilaip pacuvaik koṉṟa toṣattile pokakkaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum tāṉa māṉṉiyam pūṟuvamatikāri naṭakkak kaṭavatu Ākavum Ippaṭikkut taṟma cātaṉam paṇṇik kuṭuttom svadattāt dviguṇampuṇyam paradattānupālanam . paradattāpahār[eṇa] svadatta nniṣphalambhavet .
Digital edition of SII 17.760 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
